subcodes.first_line: Praise and thanksgiving be unto the one true God, Who hath adorned nonexistence with the ornament of being and brought forth the non-existent into existence [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: شکر و حمد خداوند یکتا را که عدم را بطراز وجود مزین فرمود و معدوم را موجود
subcodes.subjects: @thankfulness; gratitude, @goodly deeds; actions, @law of cause and effect, @the divine emanation; the all-pervading bounty of God, @unity in diversity
